name: coding-quality
description: Claude-facing coding standards — universal clean-code, git, security, error-handling, testing, and documentation rules with MUST/SHOULD/MAY tiers, plus Python, Python on AWS (boto3), Terraform/AWS, AWS Lambda (Node.js), GitLab CI (OIDC trust-policy pinning), and web-frontend stack overlays, and pre-commit/pre-PR/new-project checklists.
